title: Corporate Litigation
summary: Legal disputes arising from business operations, shareholder disputes, breach of contract, employment conflicts, IP disputes, and regulatory compliance matters.
outcome: Strategic assessment, rigorous courtroom advocacy, and ADR including mediation and arbitration aligned with client business objectives.

title: Commercial Arbitration
summary: Efficient, confidential, and binding dispute resolution for contractual disputes, cross-border transactions, joint ventures, and public procurement conflicts.
outcome: Customized arbitration agreements, experienced advocacy, and global enforcement through treaties such as the New York Convention.

title: Public Procurement Disputes
summary: Assistance with government tenders, bid compliance, disqualifications, PPMO complaints, and procurement contract administration.
outcome: Strategic guidance grounded in the Public Procurement Act, 2063 and Arbitration Act, 2055 for infrastructure and PPP projects.
